texto: Change is always a scary thing. We try to imagine various scenarios to prepare ourselves, like Jacob did with his hypotheticals. But when you find yourself in circumstances that you never thought possible, even if frequently imagined, when the consequences of those impossible, fantasy-tinted circumstances become real, it can be paralyzing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a L.E. Flinders: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Change is always a scary thing. We try to imagine various scenarios to prepare ourselves, like Ja…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, change, fear pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e fear.
